headline: Step 1: Add your image by uploading a file from your device or entering a URL
body: Step 2: Click on the "Crop" button and edit your images using the crop, flip, and rotate functions Step 3: Click on the "Convert" button to start the OCR conversion process Step 4: Save the extracted text to your device or copy it to your clipboard 3
source: uploading a file from your device or entering a URL
